name: Photoshop MCP Server
what_it_does: Photoshop MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Adobe Photoshop — creating and manipulating image layers, applying filters and adjustments, running Photoshop scripts, managing PSD files, and integrating Photoshop's professional image editing capabilities into agent-driven creative production workflows.
use_cases: Automating image editing tasks in Photoshop from design production agents
Applying consistent filters and adjustments from batch processing agents
Managing layers and compositions from design workflow agents
Processing PSD files programmatically from asset management agents
Generating image variants from AI-driven creative agents
Integrating Photoshop into automated creative production pipelines
not_for: Teams without Adobe Photoshop license ($21-55/month Creative Cloud)
Raster-to-vector conversion (use Illustrator for vector work)
Simple image resizing without Photoshop (use ImageMagick or PIL instead)
best_when: A design team with Adobe Photoshop needs AI agents to automate image editing tasks — batch processing, layer management, and creative production automation.
avoid_when: You don't have Photoshop license or need simpler image manipulation without Photoshop's full feature set.

auth.notes: No authentication — local MCP server communicating with Photoshop via photoshop-python-api. Photoshop must be running. Windows or macOS required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Adobe Photoshop requires Creative Cloud subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Adobe Creative Cloud: from $21/month for Photoshop only
pricing.notes: Adobe Photoshop requires paid Creative Cloud subscription. MCP server is free open source. photoshop-python-api is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Local Photoshop — limited by operation complexity and file size

known_agent_gotchas: Photoshop must be running — cannot launch from MCP
Photoshop COM/AppleScript scripting required — platform-specific quirks
photoshop-python-api version must match Photoshop version — check compatibility
Community MCP from loonghao — not Adobe-official
Complex operations can be slow — layer rendering and filter application take time
Creative Cloud subscription required — significant ongoing cost
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local Photoshop execution. No credentials for MCP. Community MCP. Adobe license required. Image files accessed locally — standard file system security applies.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local Photoshop execution. No credentials. Adobe license required. Community MCP.
